name: Codex CLI Session Backend
description: ACP runtime backend that routes OpenClaw ACP session turns to local Codex CLI.

command.label: Codex command
command.help: Path or command name for Codex CLI (default: codex).

cwd.label: Default CWD
cwd.help: Fallback working directory for ACP sessions when session cwd is not provided.

sandbox.label: Sandbox mode
sandbox.help: Optional codex --sandbox mode for exec turns.

extraArgs.label: Extra args
extraArgs.help: Additional static CLI args appended to codex exec/exec resume.

cancelGraceMs.label: Cancel grace (ms)
cancelGraceMs.help: SIGTERM grace period before SIGKILL in cancel/close.
